---
title: "Oliver Frings"
# TODO: add a headshot as assets/profile.jpg, then uncomment the line below
# image: assets/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:oliver.frings@agroparistech.fr
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DgFqKHYAAAAJ
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2682-2304
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/o-frings
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/oliver-frings-x161/
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: assets/CV_Oliver_Frings.pdf
---

I am a PhD candidate in economics at [AgroParisTech](https://www.agroparistech.fr/) (BETA, Nancy) and a research fellow at the [Climate Economics Chair](https://www.chaireeconomieduclimat.org/en/) in Paris. In 2025 I spent nine months as a visiting scholar at the Department of Land Economy, University of Cambridge ([C-EENRG](https://www.ceenrg.landecon.cam.ac.uk/)).

I work on the economics of nature markets: how the integrity of carbon credits — leakage, storage duration, reversal risk — can be priced, and how the public values the institutions that supply climate mitigation. My main tools are discrete choice experiments, random utility models, and Monte Carlo risk modelling, mostly in R.

My thesis, *Pricing Credibility: Supply-Side Integrity and Public Acceptability in Nature Markets*, is due for defence in October 2026. I am supervised by Jens Abildtrup and Antonello Lobianco.

## Education

**PhD in Economics** · AgroParisTech, BETA (INRAE/CNRS/University of Lorraine) · 2023–2026 (expected)

**MSc in European Forestry** (Erasmus Mundus) · University of Eastern Finland & University of Lleida · 2020–2022

**BSc in Forest Sciences** · Dresden University of Technology · 2016–2020

## Awards

Highly Commended Paper Award, 8th Workshop on Non-Market Valuation, University of Leeds (2024) · Extraordinary Prize for Master's Degrees, University of Lleida (2023)
